unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近日更多关注宏观经济数据和地缘政治事件（如伊朗、霍木兹海峡）对市场的影响，同时加大了对人工智能工具在期权分析中应用的强调。
representative_quotes: One of my favorite ways to use @unusual_whales is combining Gamma Heat Zones, net premium imbalances, options flow, daily gamma, and absolute gamma to build a complete setup.

Political trading posts get shared everywhere. But most of the time, people only see the headline. The @unusual_whales Political Trading Dashboard lets you actually dig into the data behind those disclosures.
The whole idea is simple: Price can often gravitate toward heavy gamma levels, while large net premium gaps may fill over time as price and positioning reconnect.

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期观点从短期投机转向长期持有，强调仓位管理和风险控制，避免杠杆带来的风险。
representative_quotes: 存储起来，说明ai未来光明，其他概念才有机会，才值得抄底
康宁最大的魅力在于未来的确定性。英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，那么在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！
活下去才有机会，仓位管理比买对啥更重要
